example_prompt: A Pacman game where the agent is the player.
abstract_task: open-ended arcade-style collection/navigation game with possible long-horizon strategy
reason: Full game completion can require long-horizon planning or adversarial strategy. Require deterministic progress unless the generated profile decomposes the task into a short finite solved subgoal plan.
common_failures: using BFS-only validation for collection gameplay
declaring all pellets as required when the simple validator can only verify progress
blocking start or goal cells with decorative maze geometry
